motion.$description: Functional motion only (design direction: no ambient animation). Two meanings: state feedback and expand/collapse. All transitions sit behind the global prefers-reduced-motion kill switch.

state.$description: Hover/focus/active feedback on interactive elements — fast enough to feel instant.

expand.$description: Disclosure and expand/collapse movement (accordion, future gallery).

mode.$description: Discrete mode switches (color scheme, density): the theme panel opens a brief page-wide transition window. Continuous hue dragging stays instant by design — direct manipulation must not lag.
